title: TNT Item
description: 🧨 Every item that is created by mining a block or dropping an item spawns as a TNT
body:
## 🧨 TNTItem
![Leaf Litter as TNT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6f1307f6557f0a60f7dce6e629a48e59f2da54e.png)

**This simple data pack spawns items created by destroying blocks or dropping them as TNT.**

This data pack is therefore ideal for challenges or simply for creating a chaotic world.

## 📚 How to Install
### 👤 Singleplayer
Drag the downloaded .zip file into the ```"\.minecraft\saves\YOURWORLD\datapacks"``` folder.
Now enter your world. You can check whether the datapack is enabled with /datapack list.
### 👥 Multiplayer (Server)
Drag the downloaded .zip file into the datapack folder, which is located in the default "world" folder.
Now join your server. You can check whether the datapack is enabled with /datapack list.
